GovPilot
Privacy Policy
Effective date: 26 April 2026  ·  Last updated: 26 April 2026

GovPilot ("we", "our", or "us") is a file-tracking and ministry-clearing application operated by El-Bach's. This Privacy Policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and your rights regarding your information.

By using GovPilot you agree to the practices described in this policy.

1. Information We Collect

We collect only the information necessary to operate the service:

  • Account information: your full name, email address or phone number, and password (stored as a secure hash by Supabase Auth).
  • Organisation data: company name, team member names and roles, and invite codes.
  • File and client data: client names, phone numbers, reference contacts, file notes, stage statuses, financial transactions, and documents you upload or scan.
  • Device information: push notification token (used solely to deliver in-app notifications to your device).
  • Usage data: activity timestamps, stage status changes, and comments entered within the app.

We do not collect GPS location, payment card details, or any biometric data.

2. How We Use Your Information

  • To provide and operate the GovPilot service.
  • To send push notifications about file activity (status changes, comments, new files) — only to members of your organisation.
  • To allow team members within the same organisation to collaborate on files.
  • To generate financial reports and summaries within your organisation.
  • To respond to support requests you send us.

We do not sell, rent, or share your data with any third party for marketing purposes.

3. Data Storage and Security

All data is stored on Supabase (hosted on Amazon Web Services, US-East region). Supabase applies Row Level Security (RLS) policies so that each organisation's data is strictly isolated — no other organisation can access your data.

Data is encrypted in transit (HTTPS/TLS) and at rest. Supabase Auth manages passwords using bcrypt hashing — we never see or store your plaintext password.

Session tokens are stored locally on your device using AsyncStorage. On rooted or jailbroken devices this storage may be accessible to other apps; we recommend keeping your device secure.

4. Data Retention

We retain your data for as long as your account is active. If you delete your account, your team_members record is removed immediately and your authentication account is hard-deleted within 24 hours via our secure deletion process. File and client data associated with your organisation remains until the organisation owner deletes it.

5. Your Rights

You have the right to:

  • Access the personal data we hold about you.
  • Correct inaccurate data via the Account screen in the app.
  • Delete your account at any time via Account → Security → Delete Account in the app.
  • Export your data by contacting us at the address below.
  • Object to processing by contacting us — we will respond within 30 days.

6. Push Notifications

GovPilot sends push notifications to team members about file activity. You can control which notifications you receive in the app under Settings → Notifications. You can also disable all notifications from your device's system settings at any time.

7. Children's Privacy

GovPilot is a professional business application intended for users aged 18 and over. We do not knowingly collect data from anyone under 18. If you believe a minor has registered, please contact us immediately.

8. Changes to This Policy

We may update this policy as the service evolves. We will notify registered users of material changes via a push notification or email. Continued use of GovPilot after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

9. Contact Us

For any privacy questions, data requests, or deletion requests, contact us at:

Email: hello@govpilot.app

WhatsApp: +961 70 123 456

© 2026 GovPilot · El-Bach's Privacy Policy  ·  Terms of Service
